summary: This document serves as marketing content for the KeepMeCompany AI Intake Service, detailing its value proposition as a voice-based information gathering tool for medical centres. It outlines safety and compliance statements, including CE marking as a Class I medical device, and defines the target audience as GP practices and elderly patients. The text also includes specific contact information and versioning details for the product documentation.
